name: Sticky Scroll Reveal
description: A scroll-driven layout where text content is sticky on one side while images/visuals change on the other side as you scroll through sections.
whenToUse: Use for feature showcases, product walkthroughs, or storytelling sections where you want content to stick while visuals change on scroll.

props.name: content
props.type: { title: string; description: string; content?: React.ReactNode }[]
props.description: Array of content sections with title, description, and optional visual content

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the content/visual panel
